name: dependency-risk
trigger: Before adding, upgrading, or replacing dependencies or extension/runtime integrations.
remediation: Pause, run compliance triage, and document safer substitutes or rollback.
limitations: Does not replace package-manager auditing or legal review.
The runner does not automatically check license compatibility.
fallback_behavior: Use `docs/jacks/workflows/compliance-triage.md` and document the gap honestly.
